{{CargoRelic
|name=Entropy
|class_id=20336
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Entropy in Greek means immanent, that is, the change in the intrinsic properties of a system. Boltzmann the scientist offered a statistical explanation, and proved in a series of treatises that the macroscopic physical properties of a system can be considered identical to the statistical probability average of all possible microstates.
|fame=11
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=17
|tech=31
|ss1=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail DEF +4<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss2=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail DEF +8<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss3=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail DEF +12<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss4=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail DEF +12<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20
|ss7=Per Super Memetic Chest opened:<br>> Snail DEF +12<br>Super Memetic Chests Opened: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
